texto: If either player abandon the game by quitting the table in anger, or in an otherwise offensive manner; or by momentarily resigning the game; or refuses to abide by the decision of the Umpire, the game must be scored against him.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Howard Staunton sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “If either player abandon the game by quitting the table in anger, or in an otherwise offensive ma…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, decision, game, útil em momentos de game e him.

frase_original: If either player abandon the game by quitting the table in anger, or in an otherwise offensive manner; or by momentarily resigning the game; or refuses to abide by the decision of the Umpire, the game must be scored against him.
